title: Stage 03 Clarification Gate
description: Stage 3 (Pre-Build Clarification) gate. The orchestrator (or pm in clarification mode) writes this after resolving any QUESTION: lines in pipeline/context.md.

open_questions_count.description: QUESTION: lines in pipeline/context.md still without a PM-ANSWER:. Must be zero to PASS.

answered_questions_count.description: Questions resolved during this clarification pass.

scope_changed.description: True when an answer materially changed the brief; if true, the orchestrator surfaces the delta to the user.
